# Plan - 2026-06-26

## Source

Research brief: `.github/research/2026-06-26-research.md` (three NEW items
from upstream 06-25/06-26 deltas: opencode #33977, cline #11815, opencode
#33392). Open `auto-implement` queue verified empty before planning.

## Execution order

1. **#2 bash non-interactive guidance** (prompt-only, zero rollout risk) -
   land first as warm-up / safety net.
2. **#3 `strict` tool flag** (tool surface) - stabilizes registration
   surface before #1 reshapes MCP timeouts on top of it.
3. **#1 MCP startup vs request timeout split** (MCP config) - last because
   it depends on the tool-registration code path settled in #3.
